prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021年最低位次约1299名，2022年大幅前移至415名，2024年465名，2025年回落至612名；近两年位次在400-600区间波动，2025年基准约612名；该校在天津市2021-2025年招生计划均为6人，2026年计划大幅扩招至11人，扩招幅度约83%，显著增加录取名额，对竞争格局产生重要影响。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 浙江大学 医学院隶属浙江大学（985、211、双一流），软科主榜排名全国第3，属顶尖高校层次，对高分考生吸引力极强；2026年声誉评价偏负面，涉及学术不端与校园 安全事件，可能轻微抑制部分考生报考意愿；但抖音热度排名第14（高热），短视频曝光量大，整体关注度仍处高位；临床医学（A）、基础医学（A-）、药学 （A+）等学科实力顶尖，与招生专业高度匹配，对医学类考生有强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 临床医学专业社会热度持续推荐，报考意愿稳定偏热；天津市2026年考生总数约82000人，较2025年71938人增长约14%，竞争加剧。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次612名、2026年大幅扩招 （6→11人）带来的名额增加效应、考生总数增长14%加剧竞争、声誉偏负面与抖音高热并存等因素，预计2026年最低位次约948名，区间834-1062名。扩招是影响位次的核心因素， 考生规模增长和声誉波动为次要修正方向。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 临床医学（5+3一体化）（校本部）
- 医学试验班（竺可桢学院巴德年医学班）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 临床医学（校本部）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
暂无（该校在天津仅开设三个专业，均为临床医学类，无低分专业）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 浙江大学医学院在天津仅招收临床医学类相关专业，整体录取位次极高。位次在预测区间（834-1062名）内建议以二档五年制临床医学为主攻目标，一档5+3一体化和巴德年班作 为冲刺；位次明显优于区间上限可重点冲击一档王牌专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum ranking in 2021 was approximately 1299, significantly advanced to 415 in 2022, 465 in 2024, and fell back to 612 in 2025; rankings fluctuated between 400-600 in recent two years, with a baseline of about 612 in 2025; the enrollment plan in Tianjin from 2021 to 2025 was 6 students each year, and in 2026 it will greatly expand to 11 students, an increase of about 83%, significantly increasing admission slots and impacting the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Zhejiang University School of Medicine is affiliated with Zhejiang University (985, 211, Double First-Class), ranked 3rd nationally on the Soft Science main list, belonging to the top-tier university level, strongly attracting high-scoring candidates; in 2026, the reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, involving academic misconduct and campus safety incidents, which may slightly suppress some candidates' willingness to apply; but Douyin popularity ranks 14th (high heat), with high short video exposure, overall attention remains high; clinical medicine (A), basic medicine (A-), pharmacy (A+) and other disciplines are top-tier, highly matching the enrollment majors, strongly attracting medical candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Clinical medicine major has sustained social popularity, with stable and slightly hot application willingness; the total number of candidates in Tianjin in 2026 is about 82,000, an increase of about 14% from 71,938 in 2025, intensifying competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the baseline ranking of 612 in 2025, the effect of increased slots from the significant expansion in 2026 (6 to 11 students), a 14% increase in total candidates intensifying competition, and the coexistence of negative reputation and high Douyin heat, the minimum ranking in 2026 is expected to be about 948, with a range of 834-1062. Expansion is the core factor affecting rankings, with candidate scale growth and reputation fluctuations as secondary correction directions.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult)
- Clinical Medicine (5+3 Integrated) (Main Campus)
- Medical Experimental Class (Zhu Kezhen College Ba De Nian Medical Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy)
None (The school only offers three majors in Tianjin, all clinical medicine categories, with no low-score majors).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Zhejiang University School of Medicine only admits clinical medicine-related majors in Tianjin, with overall admission rankings extremely high. For rankings within the predicted range (834-1062), it is recommended to focus on the Tier 2 five-year clinical medicine as the main target, with Tier 1 5+3 integrated and Ba De Nian class as reach goals; for rankings significantly above the upper limit of the range, focus on impacting the Tier 1 flagship majors.
